description.value: **Benefit:** You can choose to take a â1 penalty on all attack rolls and combat maneuver checks to grant your mount a +1 bonus on all attack rolls and damage rolls made with natural weapons. These effects affect you and your mount for 1 round. When your base attack bonus reaches +4, and every 4 points thereafter, this penalty increases by â1 and the bonus to your mountâs attack and damage increases by +1 to a maximum of +5. You must choose to use this feat before making an attack roll.
